problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: If Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine is applied to be, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 36 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
